rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion To Vacate Court Order Of March 1st , 2021 Expunging Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 20, 2021 line 1. DEFENDANT ANNE KIHAGI Defendants Notice Of Motion To Vacate Court Order Of March 1st , 2021 Expunging Lis Pendens is OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed for April 27, 2021. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice To Enforce Stay Pending Appeal Of Orders Striking Defendants Statements Of Disqualification
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 20, 2021 line 1. DEFENDANTS ANNE KIHAGI, JULIA MWANGI, XELAN PROP 1, LLC, RENKA PROP, LLC, NOZARI 2, LLC, ZORIALL, LLC and CHRISTINE MWANGI's Notice To Enforce Stay Pending Appeal Of Orders Striking Defendants Statements Of Disqualification is DENIED. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY YOUNG ET AL VS. OLIVIA NAVA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Franklin Dawson Beattie, Iii And Piyatida Srikumpol Beattie For Leave To File Cross-Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 20, 2021 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANTS FRANKLIN BEATTIE, III and PIYATIDA BEATTIE's Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint is continued to May 3, 2021 for parties to provide courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to the motion (except for reply; received) no later than April 23, 2021 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JAMESTOWN SA LLC; ET AL VS. JONATHAN DISHOTSKY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 20, 2021 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANTS RICHARD KALUZA, ERIN THOMPSON and COMPASS CALIFORNIA II, INC.'s DEMURRER to 1ST Amended CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to May 20, 2021. Moving party provided courtesy copies of the moving papers per March 15, 2021 minute order, but no courtesy copy of the operative cross-complaint was provided (SFRL 2.7B). Courtesy copy of the operative cross-complaint to be delivered no later than April 30, 2021 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)
